creator: tigersharke@gmail.com
text:
As the Makefile is now, there are two options, OPENGL and TEST which are present but undefined.  This prevents poudriere from building with an error 'Failed: configure'.  Worse is that OPENGL is set as a default which I believe means it could affect anyone attempting to build in any way.

I am not initiating poudriere with any extra commandline flags (such as -t for testing), do not have 'DEVELOPER=yes' in my make.conf, nor does my poudriere.conf include 'USE_PORTLINT=yes' but (seperate from poudrire) portlint says:

WARN: Makefile: OPENGL is listed in OPTIONS_DEFINE, but no PORT_OPTIONS:MOPENGL appears.
WARN: Makefile: TEST is listed in OPTIONS_DEFINE, but no PORT_OPTIONS:MTEST appears.
